utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each one is fully detailed: destination specifies 'Lisbon, Portugal'; travel_dates specifies 'June 20th to June 24th'; transportation includes flight details and cost; accommodation includes hotel details and cost; activities list specific activities and their total cost; additional_services include extra experience with cost; total_budget provides a description, total cost, and currency. All are fully specified according to the required format.

Therefore, each element in the package is mapped to its respective ground-truth rating accordingly.
